MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Daniel Lee's Motion to Extend Jurisdiction of Arbitrator is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended to 4/6/2010. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days.
